tasks.name: Write paper abstract
tasks.description: Write the abstract for 'Feature Absorption as Optimal Compression' paper. Lead with reframing, state scope (26 features, GPT-2 Small), core findings (null results + trained<random), theoretical framing (rate-distortion), contributions.

tasks.name: Write paper introduction
tasks.description: Write introduction covering: SAE credibility crisis, absorption as gap, prevailing vs. reframing, research questions (RQ1-RQ5), contributions (5 points), key results preview.

tasks.name: Write background and related work
tasks.description: Write Section 2: SAEs for interpretability, feature absorption (Chanin 2024), rate-distortion perspective, prior work on SAE reliability (Korznikov 2026, Wang 2026).

tasks.name: Write methodology section
tasks.description: Write Section 3: Phase 1 (absorption detection), Phase 2 (steering, probing, EC50), Phase 3 (inhibition graph), Phase 4 (random baseline), statistical rigor (12 tests, MCP).

tasks.name: Write results section
tasks.description: Write Section 4: H1-H6, H10 results with statistics. Include Tables 1 and 2. Key: zero hypotheses survive MCP; H5 (precision-recall) is robust finding; H6 falsified; H10 (trained<random) is key empirical contribution.

visualizations.description: Hypothesis testing summary with corrected p-values

tasks.name: Write discussion section
tasks.description: Write Section 5: Absorption as optimal compression interpretation, why inhibition graph failed, why prior work found null results, relationship to Matryoshka/OrtSAE/HSAE, methodological contributions.

tasks.name: Write limitations and future work
tasks.description: Write Section 6: Limitations (single model, narrow feature set, n=26, single metric, H10 metric concern) and future work (larger models, semantic hierarchy, alternative mechanisms, cross-architecture).

tasks.name: Write conclusion
tasks.description: Write Section 7: Summarize study, restate core finding (null + H5 + H6 + H7), restate theoretical framing, restate methodological contributions, final message.

tasks.name: Generate all paper figures
tasks.description: Generate figures from existing results data: Fig1 (absorption distribution), Fig2 (steering vs absorption), Fig3 (precision-recall), Fig4 (inhibition graph falsification), Fig5 (rate-distortion schematic), Fig6 (random vs trained SAE).

tasks.name: Integrate all sections into complete paper
tasks.description: Combine all sections into paper.md with proper LaTeX formatting, compile to PDF, verify structure matches outline.

tasks.name: Review and revise paper
tasks.description: Review integrated paper for clarity, consistency, flow. Verify all claims backed by evidence. Check figure references. Prepare for submission.
